title: Workforce Pause Invoked Event
description: Emitted when the agentic workforce (or a scoped subset) is paused — the fail-closed control action. Triggered automatically by a critical incident mapped to a hard-stop gate, or manually by the Orchestrator / ratifier. While a pause with matching scope is open and unresumed, agents in scope must not commit. Resume requires the documented resume_condition to be met + a subsequent ratifier or orchestrator action.

scope_target.description: Agent ID or repo when scope is agent/repo; omitted for scope=all

auto_invoked.description: True when triggered automatically by an incident_declared hard-stop mapping rather than a manual action

resume_condition.description: Explicit condition that must be satisfied before the workforce may resume
